pred_reason: The contract contains reentrancy vulnerabilities in transfer functions (SWC-107) and integer underflow in _getCurrentSupply() when excluded balances are large (SWC-101), both confirmed with high severity findings. Evidence: Reentrancy confirmed in _transfer functions (Finding 1); State changes after external calls violate CEI pattern (Finding 7); _getCurrentSupply() underflow when excluded balances exceed total supply (Finding 5)
